metrics.heading: Overall Mood
metrics.phrase: The company feels very optimistic about its future.
metrics.label: Thriving

metrics.heading: Company Outlook
metrics.phrase: They see their business as promising for the upcoming period.
metrics.label: Promising

metrics.heading: Sustainability
metrics.phrase: They are doing well in making products that don't harm the environment.
metrics.label: Clean

metrics.heading: Environmental
metrics.phrase: Their operations are very green and environmentally friendly.
metrics.label: Very Green

metrics.heading: People & Society
metrics.phrase: They treat people fairly and have a good relationship with society.
metrics.label: Good

metrics.heading: Corporate Governance
metrics.phrase: The way they run their business is strong and transparent.
metrics.label: Strong

metrics.heading: Management Honesty
metrics.phrase: They are open about what they do and say the right things.
metrics.label: Open

metrics.heading: Financial Health
metrics.phrase: Their finances are in excellent shape, making them very trusted by investors.
metrics.label: Excellent

metrics.heading: Growth Plans
metrics.phrase: They have ambitious plans to grow their business further.
metrics.label: Very Ambitious

metrics.heading: Risk Level
metrics.phrase: There is a moderate level of risk they need to manage carefully.
metrics.label: Moderate

metrics.heading: Investor Confidence
metrics.phrase: Investors trust and like the company's financial performance.
metrics.label: Very Trusted
